transferableStrengths.strength: AI quality evaluation operations for enterprise chatbot and internal AI assistant workflows.
Built practical GPT/chatbot evaluation workflows combining scoring, human review, and metric tracking.
Built GPT-based evaluation workflow and inspected existing Python/SQL-style automation logic for validation and troubleshooting.
Defined chatbot quality metrics, GPT scoring categories, human review loop, and A/B reporting measures.
Translated AI/privacy governance requirements into executable risk scoring, routing, and reviewer controls.
Master of Biomedical Sciences plus AI/Big Data training and scientific research operations background.
Cross-region Global/Japan AI chatbot operations and Philippines Workday KT facilitation.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Deep knowledge of benchmark design, LLM-as-Judge, quantitative quality measurement, and hallucination detection
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: No direct evidence of LLM-as-Judge calibration, hallucination detection methodology, construct validity, or contamination detection.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Structured benchmark-style chatbot evaluation and GPT-based scoring workflow.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Statistics and experimental design including hypothesis testing, A/B testing, confidence intervals, and effect sizes
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: Evidence does not prove hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, effect sizes, or statistical significance analysis.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Designed live A/B routing and reporting logic for chatbot comparison.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Practical experience with PyTorch, JAX, or TensorFlow
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: No supported evidence for PyTorch, JAX, or TensorFlow.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Keep this as a gap or transferable angle; do not claim direct ownership.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Multi-turn, tool-use, long-context, or AI-agent evaluation harnesses
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: No direct evidence of multi-agent, long-context, or tool-use evaluation harness implementation.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: AI assistant and chatbot quality evaluation workflow experience.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: CI/CD quality gates and scalable automated evaluation infrastructure
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: No direct evidence of CI/CD quality gate ownership or scalable ML evaluation infrastructure.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Automated quality workflow and production data-pipeline validation support.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: No supported PyTorch, JAX, or TensorFlow experience
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: Do not list these tools. If applying, complete and document a small LLM evaluation notebook using one framework or state no direct framework experience in interview.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Do not list these tools. If applying, complete and document a small LLM evaluation notebook using one framework or state no direct framework experience in interview.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Limited proof of advanced statistics: hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, effect sizes, significance testing
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: CV should only claim A/B routing and metric definition. Prepare an interview explanation of what was measured and avoid claiming statistical inference unless documented.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: CV should only claim A/B routing and metric definition. Prepare an interview explanation of what was measured and avoid claiming statistical inference unless documented.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: No direct reward modeling, RLHF, DPO, proper scoring rules, IRT, construct validity, or contamination detection evidence
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: Do not include these as skills. Treat them as learning gaps and ask whether the role can accept AI quality operations background.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Do not include these as skills. Treat them as learning gaps and ask whether the role can accept AI quality operations background.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Python evaluation pipeline ownership is only partially supported
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: Frame Python as existing pipeline inspection, validation, and troubleshooting unless source confirms from-scratch pipeline code ownership.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Frame Python as existing pipeline inspection, validation, and troubleshooting unless source confirms from-scratch pipeline code ownership.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: No CI/CD evaluation quality gate ownership
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: Use production monitoring and automated GPT evaluation workflow language, not CI/CD gate ownership.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Use production monitoring and automated GPT evaluation workflow language, not CI/CD gate ownership.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Language requirement is not fully evidenced
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: State only verified business communication languages and avoid claiming fluent Japanese.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: State only verified business communication languages and avoid claiming fluent Japanese.

recommendedPositioning.headline: AI Quality Operations / Conversational AI Evaluation Specialist with enterprise chatbot evaluation, GPT scoring, A/B testing, and governance automation experience.
recommendedPositioning.summaryAngle: Stretch application. The CV should not try to look like a pure AI Evaluation Scientist. The strongest safe angle is enterprise AI quality operations: chatbot evaluation framework, GPT scoring workflow, A/B attribution metrics, production AI chatbot operations, and AI governance controls. Major ML/statistics/framework gaps must remain visible internally so the CV generator does not overclaim.
wordingGuidance: Enterprise AI quality operations specialist with chatbot evaluation, GPT scoring workflow, A/B testing design, human-review QA loop, and governance automation experience.
Use adjacent-fit wording and explain weak evidence as risk.
Strengthen wording only when supported by selected evidence.
Preserve unsupported requirements as gaps or risks, not visible strengths.
